pokemon:eldegoss.name: Eldegoss
pokemon:eldegoss.summary: The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty.
The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty.

pokemon:gossifleur.name: Gossifleur
pokemon:gossifleur.summary: It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon.
It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon.
